prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `d968ffd4`.
codex_response:
Implemented `d968ffd4` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: detect the two aligned non-background rectangles, then fill the gap between them symmetrically with full-height or full-width bands of their colors, leaving a single background separator when the gap length is odd. The summary hint was used; both the Sonnet and Opus hints matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` correction was needed. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed end-to-end: official verifier `5/5`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the shared builder produced the required artifacts. I also sanity-checked the generated family from `task.json` samples and read `preview_01.png` in-session for a final preview pass.
